instruction: I have a DSL file (spec.dsl) containing 45 independent function definitions. Please translate all of them into a single Python file (output.py). The DSL uses LET/SET for variables, IF/ELSE_IF/ELSE/END_IF for conditionals, FOR...DO...END_FOR for loops, APPEND...WITH for list operations, and EMPTY_LIST[T] for typed empty lists. Each translated function must include Chinese docstrings (功能、输入参数、返回值) and Python 3.10+ type hints (e.g., list[int]). All 45 functions are independent so you can parallelize: e.g., 3 agents each translating 15 functions, then merge into one file.
